sqlMap.select: SELECT result2 result FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_TreeCache WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND QUERY = #v_PQUERY#
SELECT BOARDID || ';' BOARDID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESS_ = 0 AND ACCESSID = #v_PACCESSID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #v_PROOTBOARDID#

SELECT TREEID , USERID , TREENAME , TREENAME2 , TREELEVEL , TREESTEP , TREEUPPER , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyTree WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TREEUPPER = A.TREEID) CHILDCNT, TREEBOARDID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyTree A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ( USERID = #v_PUSERID# OR USERID = 'everyone' ) AND TREEUPPER = #v_PTREEUPPER# ORDER BY TREESTEP ASC

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid BoardID, A.boardname BoardName, A.boardname2 BoardName2, A.treevieworder TreeViewOrder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.gubun, '' BoardGroupACL FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo A JOIN ( SELECT boardid , accessid , access_, tenant_id FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND parentboardid = #v_pRootBoardID# AND access_ = 1 AND write_fg = 'true' AND boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( accessid = #v_pUserID# OR accessid = #v_pDeptID# OR accessid = #v_pCompanyID# ) ) B ON a.boardid = b.boardid AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID ORDER BY A.treevieworder ASC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID BoardID , A.BoardName BoardName , A.BoardName2 BoardName2 , A.TreeViewOrder TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor , A.Gubun , B.BOARDGROUPACL BOARDGROUPACL FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo A JOIN ( SELECT C.BoardID , C.AccessID , C.Access_ , C.BoardGroupACL , C.tenant_id FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.BoardID = D.BoardID AND C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND C.Access_ = 1 AND C.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( C.AccessID = #v_pUserID# ) AND D.ParentBoardID = #v_pRootBoardID# ) B ON A.BoardID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC

select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , A.BoardName , A.BoardName2 , A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , '' BoardGroupACL FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #v_pRootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT 'O' FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT BOARDID , SN , NAME1 , NAME2 , NAME3 , NAME4 , COLNAME , WIDTH , VIEW_FG FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_PBOARDID# )

SELECT BOARDID , SN , NAME1 , NAME2 , NAME3 , NAME4 , COLNAME , WIDTH , VIEW_FG FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

SELECT LISTTYPE , SN , NAME1 , NAME2 , NAME3 , NAME4 , COLNAME , WIDTH , VIEW_FG FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item_ListOption WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND LISTTYPE = #v_PBOARDTYPE# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN
SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards ( USERID, BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TREEVIEWNUM, VIEWORDER, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT v_PUSERID , BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , ( SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) + 1 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# ), ( SELECT NVL(MAX(VIEWORDER), 1) + 1 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# ), TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_TreeCache WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND QUERY = #v_PQUERY#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(AccessID) TOTALCOUNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardAdmin_FG = 'true' AND ( AccessID = #v_pUserID# OR AccessID = #v_pDeptID# OR AccessID = #v_pCompanyID# OR AccessID = 'everyone' ) AND BoardID = ( SELECT BoardGroupID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# )
SELECT PARENTBOARDID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
SELECT BOARDID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #parentBoardID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET BOARDTREEPATH = #boardTreePath# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET TreeViewOrder = #v_count# WHERE tenant_id = #v_tenantID# AND BoardID = #v_boardID#

UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardBackGroundInfo SET
ORGFILENAME = #v_ORGFILENAME#,
SAVEFILENAME = #v_SAVEFILENAME#,
WIDTH = #v_WIDTH#, HEIGHT = #v_HEIGHT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BACKGROUNDID = #v_BACKGROUNDID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET ParentBoardID = #v_pNewParentBoardID#, BoardGroupID = #v_pNewBoardGroupID# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pOrgBoardID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage SET ParentBoardID = #v_pNewParentBoardID# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pOrgBoardID#

UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET BOARDDESCRIPTION = #v_PDESCRIPTION#, ITEMEXPIRES = #v_PEXPIRES#, ATTACHSIZELIMIT = #v_PATTACHMAX#, URL = #v_PURL#, REPLYNOTIFY = #v_PREPLYNOTIFY#, GUBUN = #v_PGUBUN#, BOARDNAME = #v_PBOARDNAME#, DELETEAFTER = #v_PDELETEAFTER#, BOARDCOLOR = #v_PBOARDCOLOR#, BOARDNAME2 = #v_PBOARDNAME2#, PORTLET = #v_PPORTLET#, ONELINEREPLY = #v_PONELINEREPLY#, BACKGROUND = #v_PBACKGROUND#, FORMFLAG = #v_PFORM#, APPRFLAG = #v_PAPPRFLAG#, APPRMAILFLAG = #v_PAPPRMAILFLAG# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyBoards SET BOARDNAME = #v_PBOARDNAME#, BOARDNAME2 = #v_PBOARDNAME2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT T2.COMPANY , T2.DESCRIPTION , T2.DISPLAYNAME , T2. TITLE , T2.COMPANY2 , T2.DESCRIPTION2 , T2.DISPLAYNAME2 , T2.TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON T1.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID AND T1.ACCESSID = T2.CN WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
UNION
SELECT NULL COMPNAY , NULL DESCRIPTION , DISPLAYNAME , NULL TITLE , NULL COMPANY2 , NULL DESCRIPTION2 , DISPLAYNAME2 , NULL TITLE2 , T1.ACCESSID , T1.ACCESSNAME , T1.ACCESSNAME2 , T1.BOARDGROUPACL , T1.BOARDADMIN_FG , T1.ACCESS_ , T1.LISTVIEW_FG , T1.READ_FG , T1.WRITE_FG , T1.REPLY_FG , T1.DELETE_FG , T1.POSTNOTICE FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage T1 JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER T3 ON T1.TENANT_ID = T3.TENANT_ID AND T1.ACCESSID = T3.CN WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyTree SET TREENAME = #treeName#, TREENAME2 = #treeName2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TREEID = #treeUpper# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyTree WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ( TREEID = #treeUpper# AND USERID = #userId# ) OR TREEUPPER = #treeUpper#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyTree SET TREEUPPER = #moveTreeID#, TREESTEP = ( SELECT COUNT(TREENAME) + 1 FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_MyTree WHERE TREEUPPER = #moveTreeID# AND USERID = #userId# ) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TREEID = #selTreeID# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(AccessID) FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND AccessID = #v_pAccessID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage SET inherit_FG = #v_pInherit#, BoardAdmin_FG = #v_pAdmin#, ACCESS_ = #v_pAccess#, ListView_FG = #v_pListView#, Read_FG = #v_pRead#, Write_FG = #v_pWrite#, Reply_FG = #v_pReply#, Delete_FG = #v_pDelete#, PostNotice = #v_pPostNotice#, BoardGroupACL = #v_pBoardGroupACL# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND AccessID = #v_pAccessID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND AccessID = #v_pAccessID#

select.isEqual: SELECT B.BoardID , B.AccessID , B.AccessName , B.AccessName2 , B.AccessLevel , B.Access_ , B.ParentBoardID , B.BoardAdmin_FG , B.ListView_FG , B.Read_FG , B.Write_FG , B.Reply_FG , B.Delete_FG , B.inherit_FG , B.PostNotice , B.BoardGroupACL FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage B JOIN EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo A ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND B.BoardID LIKE #v_PBOARDID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT BOARDID , PARENTBOARDID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDTREEPATH LIKE #v_PBOARDID#

sqlMap.update:
UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage SET BOARDID = #v_pBoardID#, ACCESSID = #v_pAccessID#, ACCESSNAME = #v_PACCESSNAME#, ACCESSNAME2 = #v_PACCESSNAME2#,
ACCESSLEVEL = NULL,
ACCESSLEVEL = #v_PACCESSLEVEL#,
ACCESS_ = #v_PACCESS#, PARENTBOARDID = #v_PPARENTBOARDID#, BOARDADMIN_FG = #v_PBOARDADMIN_FG#, LISTVIEW_FG = #v_PLISTVIEW_FG#, READ_FG = #v_PREAD_FG#, WRITE_FG = #v_PWRITE_FG#, REPLY_FG = #v_PREPLY_FG#, DELETE_FG = #v_PDELETE_FG#, INHERIT_FG = #v_PINHERIT_FG#, POSTNOTICE = #v_PPOSTNOTICE#, BOARDGROUPACL = #v_PBOARDGROUPACL# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESSID = #v_PACCESSID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage ( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESSLEVEL, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, POSTNOTICE, BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_pBoardID# , ACCESSID , ACCESSNAME , ACCESSNAME2 , ACCESSLEVEL , ACCESS_ , #v_PPARENTBOARDID# , BOARDADMIN_FG , LISTVIEW_FG , READ_FG , WRITE_FG , REPLY_FG , DELETE_FG , INHERIT_FG , POSTNOTICE , BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PDEFAULTBOARDID# )

INSERT INTO EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage ( BOARDID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, ACCESSLEVEL, ACCESS_, PARENTBOARDID, BOARDADMIN_FG, LISTVIEW_FG, READ_FG, WRITE_FG, REPLY_FG, DELETE_FG, INHERIT_FG, POSTNOTICE, BOARDGROUPACL, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_pBoardID# , ACCESSID , ACCESSNAME , ACCESSNAME2 , ACCESSLEVEL , ACCESS_ , #v_PPARENTBOARDID# , BOARDADMIN_FG , LISTVIEW_FG , READ_FG , WRITE_FG , REPLY_FG , DELETE_FG , INHERIT_FG , POSTNOTICE , BOARDGROUPACL , TENANT_ID FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PDEFAULTBOARDID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_ApprList WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
FORMFLAG = 'Y'
AND FORMLOCATION IS NOT NULL
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZBOARDSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo SET FORMLOCATION = #v_PFORMLOCATION# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT appruserid FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT boardid, boardname, boardname2, treevieworder, '' as boardcolor, '' as gubun, '' as boardgroupacl FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND parentboardid = #parentBoardID# ORDER BY treevieworder

SELECT boardid, accessid , accessname , accessname2 , accesslevel , access_ , parentboardid , boardadmin_fg , listview_fg , read_fg , write_fg , reply_fg , delete_fg , inherit_fg , postnotice , boardgroupacl FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #pBoardID# AND accessid = #userDeptPath# AND rownum <= 1

SELECT backgroundid, orgfilename , savefilename , reguserid , regdate , isuse , sn , width , height FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDBACKGROUNDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
backgroundid = #backgroundID# ORDER BY sn
SELECT boardid , tablecol , sn , colname1 , colname2 , value , coltype , must FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO_ATTRIBUTE WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID# ORDER BY sn
sqlMap.update: UPDATE ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDBACKGROUNDINFO SET isuse = #isUse# sn = #isUse# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND backgroundid = #backgroundID#
UPDATE ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO SET attributeyn = #value# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDBACKGROUNDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND backgroundid = #backgroundID#
DELETE FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO_ATTRIBUTE WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID#
DELETE FROM ezBoardSTD.TBL_BOARD_ITEM_LISTOPTION_BOAR WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID#
